_meta.note: Single remote-target health probe (P5 / FR-021). Dials the named target's operator-forwarded LOCAL socket and returns { reachable, daemon_version }. A target whose tunnel is down reports reachable=false (not an error). Gated on the operator's allow_remote cap: probing reaches off-host through the tunnel, so the adapter first confirms allow_remote on the LOCAL daemon, which means a down local daemon yields the canonical daemon_unavailable envelope. Constitution IV: only a LOCAL socket path is dialed; no public network port is opened.

invariants: requires_daemon=true in system_discover (confirms allow_remote on the local daemon)
a down/unforwarded target reports reachable=false, never an error body
gated on allow_remote; never opens a public network port
only a LOCAL forward socket path is dialed (constitution IV)
